delayed_fills.note: Delayed historical tape. Symbols, events, and rounded price zones.

holder_registry.bandwidth_rule: HedgAI defines wallet bandwidth: base slots are HedgAI, SOL, and USDC. Active PIT starts with 10 total symbol slots, but Trinity may use fewer based on capital, reserves, and risk.
holder_registry.control_rule: HedgAI can unlock registry visibility and check-in eligibility, but never grants control over Trinity systems.

holder_registry.name: HedgAI Holder Registry
holder_registry.ping_in_rule: Active PIT requires about $1 of HedgAI at scan time, currently 1 HedgAI. If a wallet drifts within 10% of the threshold, it has a 24 hour grace window before new intent cards pause.
holder_registry.signup_rule: Hold 1 HedgAI to be recognized on the holder wall. Recognition is not a product promise or control right.

strategy_flow.summary: Aggregated process touches only. One symbol can appear in multiple stages. No active size, exact target, or next-entry data.

entries.change: Lowered SolSpot proof-phase discovery floors while keeping Jupiter route validation, liquidity, transaction count, positive movement, and Trinity capital caps.
entries.rule_effect: Fresh discovery can qualify with $10K liquidity, $20K 24h volume, $5K current-hour volume, $250 baseline hourly volume, 150 one-hour transactions, 1.05x relative volume, and a valid Jupiter route. Deep-flow fallback starts at $25K liquidity, $250K 24h volume, $25K current-hour volume, and 300 one-hour transactions.
entries.trigger: Scanner was producing watch candidates but too few actionable routeable cards for a tiny proof wallet.

entries.change: Raised SolSpot discovery gates to require hard floors for 24h volume, current-hour volume, baseline hourly volume, liquidity, transaction count, route quality, and relative volume.
entries.rule_effect: Fresh discovery buys require at least $1M 24h volume, $50K current-hour volume, $25K baseline hourly volume, $50K liquidity, 250 one-hour transactions, 5x relative volume, and a valid Jupiter route.
entries.trigger: okdog dust scout collapsed after a temporary spike with insufficient durable trading activity.

feedback_channel.policy: Outside suggestions are idea intake only. Trinity rules change only after owner review, testing, and operator confirmation.

learning.name: Trinity Strategy Learning Ledger
learning.summary: Operator-confirmed strategy lessons become durable guardrails, filters, or parameter changes.
